anthropic.name: Anthropic
anthropic.quote: High-trust, low-politics environment. Mission-driven to the core. Engineers own projects end-to-end with incredible autonomy.
pros: Mission-driven to the core, not marketing
Incredible autonomy and ownership
Top-tier comp ($300k–$490k TC for engineers)
Smart, humble, low-ego coworkers
cons: High-intensity — 60+ hr crunch weeks happen
Processes still catching up to hypergrowth
Some teams lack clear career ladders
SF-heavy despite "remote-friendly" label

reviewPros: Mission-driven to the core — the safety focus is genuine and deeply embedded
Incredible autonomy and ownership, even for mid-level engineers
reviewCons: High-intensity environment — extended work hours are common during peak periods
Processes still catching up to hypergrowth; some things feel ad-hoc

huggingface.name: Hugging Face

Remote-first and async culture actually works
Flat hierarchy, anyone can push to main
Incredible community and developer love
cons: Below-market comp compared to FAANG
Fast-moving environment with lightweight processes
Career progression unclear
Some teams stretched thin
